'''bagatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kadogo|kadogo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-g-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kadogo|kadogo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| bagatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bægæthæth|bægæthæth]] || [[word:bægæthæj|bægæthæj]] || [[word:bægæthæsh|bægæthæsh]] || [[word:bægæthæ|bægæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bagagathath|bagagathath]] || [[word:bagagathaj|bagagathaj]] || [[word:bagagathash|bagagathash]] || [[word:bagagatha|bagagatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bagathath|bagathath]] || [[word:bagathaj|bagathaj]] || [[word:bagathash|bagathash]] || [[word:bagatha|bagatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bagafthath|bagafthath]] || [[word:bagafthaj|bagafthaj]] || [[word:bagafthash|bagafthash]] || [[word:bagafthaf|bagafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bagathatha|bagathatha]] || [[word:bagathaja|bagathaja]] || [[word:bagathasha|bagathasha]] || [[word:bagathaka|bagathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bagathath|bagathath]] || [[word:bagathaj|bagathaj]] || [[word:bagathash|bagathash]] || [[word:bagatha|bagatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bagathathal|bagathathal]] || [[word:bagathajal|bagathajal]] || [[word:bagathashal|bagathashal]] || [[word:bagathakal|bagathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bagathathatha|bagathathatha]] || [[word:bagathajaja|bagathajaja]] || [[word:bagathashasha|bagathashasha]] || [[word:bagathaka|bagathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bagathathan|bagathathan]] || [[word:bagathajan|bagathajan]] || [[word:bagathashan|bagathashan]] || [[word:bagathakan|bagathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bagathathaoro|bagathathaoro]] || [[word:bagathajaoro|bagathajaoro]] || [[word:bagathashaoro|bagathashaoro]] || [[word:bagathakaoro|bagathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
